comment: Human review decisions keyed by stable concept ID. Missing entries are pending and ineligible for challenger sampling. formHash fingerprints the reviewed content; a mismatch marks the review stale.

brand-identity-canon-channel-junction-id.note: mhh the model had no idea what to do with that

brand-identity-canon-girard-color-compen.note: idk doesn't come together that nicely

clouds-storms-auroras-auroral-curtain.note: transferred to composition catalog as collective-fields-folded-curtain

design-canon-after-hours-galleria.note: didn't translate well into a full visual system

design-canon-alhambra-zellige-court.note: this is pretty cool, the actual concept is meh but i love that it is middle eastern, i'd love some more inspiration from around the world, not just western centric visual systems

design-canon-dancheong-bracket-polychrom.note: this didn't translate well into ui

design-canon-neon-mall-nocturne.note: didn't quite do a good job in the image gen, unfortunately

design-canon-vaporwave-mall-atrium.note: too kitschy. neon shopping mall would work, but the font here and accepts are terrible..

digital-design-canon-desktop-skin-worksh.note: cool but not practical, dont think anyone would use it, at least the mobile ui

geological-strata-crystals-gem-lapidary-.note: doesn't work well as a visual system

geological-strata-crystals-geode-hidden-.note: good idea, want something with geodes or gemstones, but this one doesn't quite work

glass-refraction-transparency-leaded-ros.note: stained-glass would be great, this one is a bit too gothic/religious

ink-pigment-printmaking-handscroll-and-s.note: didn't translate intto interesting visual ui, for some reason

medium-native-variable-font-bellows-pres.note: transferred to composition catalog as interaction-physics-bellows-breath

metal-forging-patina-hammered-copper-ves.note: i love this hammered copper, but somehow doesn't translate well

metal-forging-patina-mokume-gane-burl.note: too narrow as a visual system

notation-diagram-systems-kamon-crest-sys.note: didn't translate into a strong visual system

pop-culture-shelf-blister-card-wall.note: this is nice, but too extremely manly (the metal brush is no good). i'd love some more gender neutral action figure variants, or maybe even barbie / female like

pop-culture-shelf-camcorder-overlay.note: pretty good but the 'recording indicator' is already an ai slop meme

pop-culture-shelf-eurostile-panel-comput.note: thought this would translate well, but the imagery sucks

pop-culture-shelf-fashion-doll-dreamhous.note: this one is a bit too over the top pink, but i would love to see some more alts that have feminine energy, including fashion-doll

pop-culture-shelf-starship-readout-grid.note: ok but no visual consistency at all, the two images are very different

pop-culture-shelf-tcg-card-frame.note: good concept but this old game ui just looks a bit too cheap

signals-instruments-radar-scope-watch.note: too similar to others we already have

textiles-weave-drape-fashion-bias-cut-gr.note: i think this wouldn't translate well in non fashion worlds

vernacular-ephemera-cassette-j-card.note: pretty good, would love to see more cassette tape and vhs aesthetic design systems

vernacular-ephemera-conductor-punch-stub.note: a bit to reduced to these bunch stubs

vernacular-ephemera-elevator-floor-direc.note: the fake brass on ui looks cheap for some reason

vernacular-ephemera-hand-turned-scoreboa.note: ok but it is a bit too limited.. would like to see a variation that expands on this a little more, but right now it's just green

vernacular-ephemera-hardware-bin-wall.note: same problem as copper, the skeuomorphism here looks cheap (often skeuomorphism works, don't take is as sign against skeuo)

vernacular-ephemera-punch-clock-timecard.note: doesn't translate well into visual idea

wayfinding-cartography-signage-emergency.note: this feels too gimmicky / one-trick pony

wayfinding-cartography-signage-karakoram.note: transferred to composition catalog as data-dramaturgy-raking-relief-terrain
